name: Tortellini Pesto Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mayonnaise, tortellini, Parmesan cheese, zucchini, parsley, carrots, garlic, cherry tomatoes, and crushed basil in a large bowl.
2. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Chill the salad mixture for at least 30 minutes before serving.
4. Just before serving, add the chopped walnuts on top of the salad.
